nasb.text: God saw all that He had made, and behold, it was very good. And there was evening and there was morning, the sixth day.

esv.text: And God saw everything that he had made, and behold, it was very good. And there was evening and there was morning, the sixth day.

cnv.text: 神看他所造的一切都很好。有晚上，有早晨；這是第六日。

ccb.text: 上帝看了，感到非常满意。晚上过去，早晨到来，这是第六天。

csbs.text: 神看着他所造的一切，看哪，都非常好！有晚上，有早晨；这是第六日。
